entities.player: a boy in a red jersey scowling
entities.referee: a referee holding a yellow card

scenes.title: The Red Card
scenes.background_prompt: A soccer field with painted white lines, two goals, grass slightly worn in the center, corner flags, and an overcast sky. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A soccer field on an overcast afternoon. A boy of about twelve in a red jersey with the number 7, white shorts, and muddy cleats stands in the center circle, scowling intensely. His fists are clenched at his sides, his face flushed red, and his shoulders are raised in barely contained fury. Facing him at arm's length, a referee in a black shirt and shorts holds up a yellow card at head height, expression stern and impartial. Other players in the background are blurred, some standing with hands on their hips. The soccer ball sits on the worn grass between them. Corner flags in bright yellow flutter in the breeze. A scoreboard on the sideline reads 2-1.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place player in the center circle, standing with fists clenched at sides, face flushed red, scowling intensely. Place referee facing him at arm's length, standing and holding up a yellow card at head height, expression stern.
scenes.scene_description: In the immediate foreground at the bottom left, there are clusters of green leafy bushes and grass. Moving right along the bottom edge, there are small white and yellow flowers on thin stems, several three-leaf clovers, and various tufts of grass. Above this foreground foliage lies a green soccer field marked with white lines. On the far left corner of the field stands a small red flag on a white pole, and behind it sits a soccer goal with a white frame and white netting. The white lines on the left side of the field delineate the corner arc and the penalty area. In the center of the field, a player and a referee stand facing each other across a vertical white halfway line. The player is a young boy with brown hair and a bright red, angry face with furrowed brows. He wears a red short-sleeved shirt with two horizontal white stripes, dark blue shorts, white socks with red stripes, and brown and white sneakers. He stands rigidly with his fists clenched at his sides. The referee is a man with brown hair and a stern expression, wearing a black and white vertically striped shirt, black shorts, black socks with white stripes, and black shoes. He stands upright, holding a small yellow card aloft in his right hand toward the player. To the right of the the referee, the field continues with white lines marking the center circle and the right-side penalty area. Another soccer goal with a white frame and netting is positioned on the right side of the field. Two more red flags on white poles mark the far back corners of the field, and a fourth red flag stands at the front right corner. Surrounding the field is a dense border of rounded, stylized green trees and bushes in various shades of green. Through a gap in the trees behind the characters, a distant yellow-green hill is visible. The sky above is light blue and filled with large, puffy white and light grey clouds, suggesting a bright day.

CH: a young boy with a red face
a stern referee in a striped shirt
S: a green soccer field with white lines
a bright day with puffy white clouds
lush green trees surrounding the field
white soccer goals at each end
IE: the player committed a foul during play
the referee stopped the soccer game
IR: the player feels very angry and frustrated
the referee feels stern and serious
P: the referee wants to penalize the player
the boy wants to argue the call
A: the referee holds up a yellow card
the boy clenches his fists tightly
the characters stand on the halfway line
CO: the player receives a yellow card warning
the game is paused for a penalty

ENP: small red flags on white poles
a red shirt with white stripes
large puffy white and grey clouds
SC: while they stand on the field
